results.title: Kerala Budget: National Pension Scheme to be revamped for state employees
results.description: Kerala Budget: Chief Minister V D\u00A0Satheesan announces revamp of NPS pension system, timely DA/DR distribution, and MEDISEP overhaul.

results.title: Capstone Wealth Management Inc. Takes Position in Lowe’s Companies, Inc. $LOW
results.description: Capstone Wealth Management Inc. bought a new stake in Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW – Free Report) in the 4th quarter, Holdings Channel.com reports. The fund bought 8,059 shares of the home improvement retailer’s stock, valued at approximately $1,961,000. Lowe’s Companies accounts for about 1.7% of Capstone Wealth Management Inc.’s holdings, making the stock its 14th [...]

results.title: Shs 650bn Approved for Arua International Airport Upgrade
results.description: Uganda has secured a major infrastructure boost after the African Development Bank (AfDB) approved nearly €156 million (about Shs 650 billion) to transform Arua Airport into an international-standard

results.title: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd spurts 0.27%, gains for five straight sessions
results.description: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd is quoting at Rs 1844, up 0.27% on the day as on 12:44 IST on the NSE. The stock is down 6.44% in last one year as compared to a 4.62% fall in NIFTY and a 0.91% fall in the Nifty Financial Services.

results.title: The Bower Coronado Joins Small Luxury Hotels of the World, Marking SLH’s First-ever Member in Coronado, California
results.description: The 39-key Bower Coronado becomes SLH's first member in Coronado, CA, gaining access to the SLH Club loyalty program and Hilton Honors booking integration.

results.title: 5 Milwaukee Tools With Deep Discounts In June 2026
results.description: Milwaukee tools aren't cheap, but several major discounts are available this month for shoppers looking to expand their collection for less.

results.title: Accenture acquires Dragos in $4.17bn OT security bet
results.description: Accenture has announced plans to acquire a majority stake in operational technology cybersecurity specialist Dragos alongside full ownership of runZero and NetRise, as it bets $4.175bn on defending the world’s critical infrastructure against AI-driven threats. The combined transaction, covering all three companies, is valued at approximately $4.175bn, subject to customary purchase price adjustments.
